headline: Why Paramount (PSKY) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of multinational media and entertainment corporation Paramount (NASDAQ:PSKY) jumped 9.4% in the afternoon session after it announced it was close to securing $24 billion in funding from three major Middle Eastern wealth funds.

headline: Paramount Skydance Gets Gulf Money for Warner Bros. Deal. The Stock Is Rising.
summary: The company struck equity deals with three Gulf sovereign-wealth funds to support its takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery.

headline: Middle East Capital Backs Paramount Skydance Deal And Valuation Story
summary: Paramount Skydance (NasdaqGS:PSKY) has secured large equity commitments from several Middle Eastern sovereign wealth funds. Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund, Qatar Investment Authority, and L'imad Holding Co. are participating in the funding package. The commitments are intended to support Paramount Skydance's proposed US$81b acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery. For you as an investor, this ties global capital flows directly to one of Hollywood's biggest media combinations. Paramount...

headline: Wall Street Holds Its Ground While Trump's Iran Deadline Ticks Down
summary: There's something almost surreal about watching markets grind higher while a sitting U.S. president warns he can level an entire country "in one night." Yet that's exactly where we found ourselves on Monday.
